title: Three Basic Algorithm Examples: A Comparative Flow
description: A flowchart demonstrating the problem-solving logic and key steps for three foundational algorithm examples: Binary Search, Insertion Sort, and a simple recursive function (e.g., Factorial calculation).
relationships: Each element represents a distinct algorithmic paradigm, with arrows illustrating their step-by-step logic and decision points, contrasting iterative vs. recursive approaches and their time complexities (O(log n), O(n²), O(n)).
